items.title: Silver and gold prices stage a cautious rebound — but analysts see slim hopes for a sustained rally
items.summary: Precious metals have rallied in recent days, but analysts say prices could face a difficult path back to all-time highs achieved earlier this year.

items.title: John Paulson says we are in the early stages of a long-term bull market for gold
items.summary: He said demand for bullion continues to broaden, led by central banks that have been adding to their reserves alongside growing private-sector interest.

items.title: Kevin Warsh has homed in on three key phrases. How Fed watchers interpret them
items.summary: In five public appearances, Warsh has used the phrase "family fight" 13 times, returning to "first principles" 11 times and "inflation is a choice" for the Fed six times.
